query: What was the global renewable energy capacity added in the first half of 2026, in gigawatts?

documents.title: Renewable Energy Capacity Report H1 2026
documents.text: A total of 420 gigawatts of renewable energy capacity was added globally in the first half of 2026, setting a new record according to the industry consortium.

documents.title: Energy Statistics Q2 2026
documents.text: A total of 420 gigawatts of new renewable capacity was added globally in the first half of 2026, consistent with prior projections from the statistics board.

claims: 420 gigawatts of renewable capacity was added globally in the first half of 2026
